title: portulaca lutea
intro: Portulaca lutea, also known as yellow purslane, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Portulacaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin issues and wounds, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and promoting digestion, making it a valuable addition to herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Portulaca lutea include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
